allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Repos\\planner-v2-scaffold\\public" | ForEach-Object { Move-Item $_.FullName "C:\\Repos\\PlannerV2\\public\\$\($_.Name\)" -Force }; Remove-Item "C:\\Repos\\planner-v2-scaffold\\AGENTS.md" -Force; Remove-Item "C:\\Repos\\planner-v2-scaffold" -Recurse -Force; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Repos\\PlannerV2" -Force | Format-Table Name, Mode -AutoSize)
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit; if \($?\) { Write-Output "TSC OK" } else { Write-Output "TSC FAILED $LASTEXITCODE" })
PowerShell(npx --yes shadcn@latest add button input label --silent --yes 2>&1)

PowerShell(node -e "console.log\('clsx:', require\('clsx'\).clsx ? 'ok' : 'missing'\); console.log\('tailwind-merge:', require\('tailwind-merge'\).twMerge ? 'ok' : 'missing'\); console.log\('cva:', require\('class-variance-authority'\).cva ? 'ok' : 'missing'\)")
